Step #2: Your Avatar
As you'll learn in the video, the term "avatar" is just "Marketing Speak" for defining who your ideal
customer is.
I remain stunned -- even after decades of experience with clueless clients -- how many otherwise smart
business owners cannot tell me who they're trying to sell to.
They may have a vague idea, or a "gut feeling" about it… but they haven't done any serious thinking
about it at all.
And that's why their advertising, websites, and other marketing efforts are a shambles.
This may be your first brush with salesmanship psychology. Or, you may have read a bit about this matter
before.
Regardless, what I reveal to you here is a working model to get into the mindset of your best possible
prospect… so you can "talk directly to his needs" whenever you reach out to him.
For most folks -- including many veteran marketers with years of experience under their belts -- the
exercise at the end of this section will be the FIRST time they've attempted to zero-in on getting into the
head of their target prospect. This is a basic tool in every great salesman's kit.
Copyright © JCSD Publishing LLC
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 1 of 15 --

Step #2: Your Avatar
You are directing your sales message to a real
human being, one at a time, in a real conversation.
Not a group, not a faceless crowd. Not “all aunts”,
but Aunt Susie. Not “all golfers”, but your pal Bob
with all his problems and idiosyncrasies.
The more you know about her, the more focused
and effective that conversation will be, and the
more you will sell.
So… who are you writing or speaking to?
Copyright © JCSD Publishing LLC
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 2 of 15 --

Your Avatar
• Who are you selling to? Where does she live,
what are her average demographic ranges (as
best as you can tell)…
• What are her needs, where does it hurt, and…
• What does she need to hear from you to feel
good about buying?
Copyright © JCSD Publishing LLC
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 13 of 15 --

Why Does This Christian Doctor
Urgently Need To Speak With You
About Your Health?
Copyright © JCSD Publishing LLC
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 14 of 15 --

Step #2: Your Avatar
Step #2 Exercise:
Following the instructions from the video, do your own version of this exercise.
Take as much time as you need to really get to know your perfect prospect.
• Who are you selling to?
• What are her needs, where does it hurt, and…
• What does she need to hear from you to feel good about buying?
Copyright © JCSD Publishing LLC
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com
